title: Jason Momoa Exits Justin Lin’s Video Game Adaptation ‘Helldivers’; Search for New Star Underway
content:
ByPat Saperstein

Deputy Editor

Jason Momoais leaving “Helldivers,” the video game adaptation from PlayStation Productions and Sony Pictures, directed by Justin Lin.

No reason was given for his exit from the project, which is based on the video game franchise from Arrowhead Game Studios. Sony is underway on a search for a new star and other cast members.

The shooter-style game follows an elite unit of soldiers — known as Helldivers — who battle alien creatures that are threatening to destroy the fictional planet of Super Earth. The sci-fi action film is currently scheduled for a Nov. 10, 2027, release, and further plot details are not yet known. Momoa’s casting wasfirst announcedin February.

Hutch Parker produces with PlayStation Productions’ Asad Qizilbash and Lin through Perfect Storm Entertainment.

Sony and PlayStation previously collaborated on 2022’s “Uncharted” with Tom Holland and Mark Wahlberg, which grossed $407 million worldwide. Peacock’s “Twisted Metal” series and HBO’s “The Last of Us” were also Sony-PlayStation collaborations.

“Helldivers” was released in 2015 by Arrowhead Game Studios, and a sequel, “Helldivers 2,” was released in 2024, so there’s plenty of sequel potential for the property.

Momoa has several projects in the works, including “A Minecraft Movie: Squared,” the follow-up to his hit “Minecraft”; live action-animation hybrid “Animal Friends”; “Fast Forever” and “Protecting Jared.” This year, he will star in Paramount and Legendary’s video game adaptation “Street Fighter” as the feral savage Blanka, “Dune: Part 3” as swordmaster Duncan Idaho and “Supergirl” as intergalactic bounty hunter Lobo.

Deadline first reported the news.
title_zh: 傑森·莫瑪(Jason Momoa)退出了賈斯汀·林(Justin Lin)的電子遊戲改編電影《地獄潛行者》(Helldivers)；目前正在尋找新主角。
content_zh:
由帕特·薩佩斯坦(Pat Saperstein)報導

副編輯

傑森·莫瑪(Jason Momoa)將離開PlayStation Productions和索尼影業(Sony Pictures)製作的影片改編《地獄潛者》(Helldivers)，該片由林詣芬(Justin Lin)執導。

目前尚未透露他退出該項目的原因，該片改編自Arrowhead Game Studios的視頻遊戲系列。索尼正在尋找新的主角和其他演員。

這款射擊風格的遊戲講述了一支精英士兵單位——被稱為地獄潛者(Helldivers)——與威脅摧毀虛構星球超級地球(Super Earth)的外星生物作鬥爭的故事。這部科幻動作片目前定於2027年11月10日上映，具體情節尚未公布。莫瑪的角色首次宣布是在二月份。

哈奇·帕克(Hutch Parker)與PlayStation Productions的阿薩德·基茲巴什(Asad Qizilbash)和林詣芬共同通過完美風暴娛樂(Perfect Storm Entertainment)製作。

索尼和PlayStation之前合作過2022年的《神秘海域》(Uncharted)，由湯姆·霍蘭德(Tom Holland)和馬克·沃爾伯格(Mark Wahlberg)主演，全球票房達到4.07億美元。Peacock的《扭曲金屬》(Twisted Metal)系列和HBO的《最後生還者》(The Last of Us)也是索尼和PlayStation的合作作品。

《地獄潛者》(Helldivers)於2015年由Arrowhead Game Studios發行，續集《地獄潛者2》(Helldivers 2)則於2024年推出，因此該系列有著豐富的續集潛力。

莫瑪目前有幾個項目在進行中，包括《我的世界電影：平方版》(A Minecraft Movie: Squared)，這是他熱門作品《我的世界》(Minecraft)的續集；真人與動畫混合的《動物朋友》(Animal Friends)；《永遠的速度》(Fast Forever)和《保護賈瑞德》(Protecting Jared)。今年，他將在派拉蒙(Paramount)和傳奇影業(Legendary)的視頻遊戲改編片《街頭霸王》(Street Fighter)中飾演野蠻的布蘭卡(Blanka)，在《沙丘：第三部》(Dune: Part 3)中飾演劍術大師鄧肯·艾達荷(Duncan Idaho)，以及在《超女》(Supergirl)中飾演星際賞金獵人洛博(Lobo)。

Deadline首次報導了這一消息。
summary_zh:
由帕特·薩佩斯坦(Pat Saperstein)報導

副編輯

傑森·莫瑪(Jason Momoa)將離開PlayStation Productions和索尼影業(Sony Pictures)製作的影片改編《地獄潛者》(Helldivers)，該片由林詣芬(Justin Lin)執導。

目前尚未透露他退出該項目的原因，該片改編自Arrowhead Game Studios的視頻遊戲系列。
